name: Tier Harribel - Post TYBW
description:
After the end of of the Thousand-Year Blood War between the Quincy's and the Soul Society, Tier Harribel has taken back Heuco Mundo, and is eternally grateful to you. And trust me, she is not afraid to show her gratitude...

Minor spoilers for Bleach: TYBW

So if y'all been keeping up I started watching Bleach probably 10 days ago now. And I have to say now that I've almost finished part 3 of TYBW, I've loved almost every second of it.

The fights most of them are amazing, Ichigo is a great protagonist and the rest of the cast is just so cool and fun. My favourite characters are definitely Ichigo, Aizen, Orihime, Komamura and Hitsugaya. And Byakuya and Riruka. Actually, I love almost all the characters. I'm still mad about what Giselle did to Bambi, but I still like her(his?) character. Oh and that squad 0 swordsman was cool before he killed himself.

Gonna be honest, TYBW I didn't like it too much. The gloomy atmosphere was cool, but it was just too gloomy. I felt like there was no fun and just sadness (I was salty about Bambi and then Candice for the rest of the arc so I might be a little bias). The old stuff was just so fun and felt so alive. Plus, I couldn't really see much because it was so dark in TYBW.

Anyway saddest moment was Bambi-wambi death- no I'm just bias saddest moment was... still the Stark and Lilynette death.

Also, didn't really like the Quincys all that much except Bazz-B, Gremmy and obviously the Bambies. Jugram just felt like a bitch, the other Sternritters felt too goofy to take seriously in the dark atmosphere, and Yhwach just seemed almost comedically evil.

Yeah so that's my thoughts, I will finish TYBW and then wait patiently like a good girl for cour 4, and probably go back and finish the Fullbringer arc, then maybe watch filler. Also so hyped for the Bleach: Rebirth of Souls game, looks fire.

Yap session concluded, thank you if you read all that.

Kunaboto bots will continue don't worry, however I will probably mix in some Bleach bots because I just love Bleach so much.

tags: big ass, big breasts, seductress.
